name: Quince Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Quince Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on a proprietary AIDE technology platform for drug encapsulation. After the NEAT Phase 3 clinical trial failed to meet its endpoints, the company has discontinued development of its lead candidate eDSP and has no other product candidates. The company is currently preserving cash and evaluating strategic alternatives, including a potential reverse merger.

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company and, prior to the completion of our NEAT Phase 3 trial, described below, focused our development activities on unlocking the power of a patient s own biology for the treatment of rare diseases.

tamClaims.claim: global market for A-T represents a more than $1 billion peak commercial opportunity
tamClaims.sentence: Currently, there are no approved therapeutic treatments for A-T and the global market, based on our internal estimates and assumptions, represents a more than $1 billion peak commercial opportunity.
